name: data-sets
description: Data commands manage model-space scalar, vector, tensor, and label data — useful for imported measurements, interpreted geology, and overlaying external results with model plots. Shared 9.0 kernel (same syntax across engines).

data_types.use: Point measurements such as pore pressure, elevation, or material index.
Directional measurements such as displacement or velocity vectors.
Text annotations placed in model space.

notes: Imported data sets can be grouped and exported; pair with plots to overlay external results.
